step_rationale: Macrophage marker; plaque-resident inflammation and matrix-degrading macrophage infiltration.
mechanism: Macrophage surface antigen marking monocyte/macrophage accumulation that destabilizes atherosclerotic plaque and signals rupture vulnerability.
